things.name: Antigua Guatemala Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage colonial city with volcano views - the most beautiful in Central America

things.name: Tikal Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Maya city with 70m pyramid temples rising above the rainforest

things.name: National Palace of Culture
things.description: 1943 jade-green neoclassical palace with murals by Alfredo Galvez Suarez

things.name: Metropolitan Cathedral
things.description: 18th-century cathedral on the central plaza with the bones of Spanish colonial victims

things.name: National Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology
things.description: Jade Maya masks, stelae and artefacts from Tikal and Quirigua

things.name: Mercado de Artesanias
things.description: Handicraft market with huipil blouses, jade, Mayan textiles and wood carvings

things.name: Lake Atitlan Day Trip
things.description: Volcanic crater lake called the world's most beautiful by Aldous Huxley

things.name: Zone 4 (Cuatro Grados Norte)
things.description: Guatemala City's hip creative quarter with street art, breweries and restaurants

things.name: Popocatepetl Pacaya Volcano Hike
things.description: Easy hike to lava flows of Pacaya volcano 45km from the capital

things.name: Pepian Stew
things.description: Guatemala's national dish - pumpkin seed and chilli stew with chicken or beef
